title: 5G-NSID: A Labeled Cyberattack Dataset for 5G Network Slicing
description: Built a virtual 5G testbed capturing real UE traffic, identifying attacks with a rule-based IDS, and classifying them using ML models (98% accuracy).

title: AI-Powered Job Portal
description: A full-stack MERN job portal integrated with OpenAI for automated job description generation and robust JWT role-based authentication.

title: Copyright Protection for Digital Images
description: A digital watermarking scheme using visual cryptography for copyright protection, successfully extracting invisible watermarks against modifications.

title: E-Commerce Web App
description: A feature-rich MERN stack e-commerce platform with Redux state management, robust product filters, review systems, and secure JWT-based admin dashboards.

title: Door to Door Delivery
description: A hyper-local delivery app matching community product requests with available individuals. Features real-time FCFS task acceptance and automated notifications.

title: Real-time Chat Application
description: An intuitive real-time messaging platform connecting users globally. Supports instant private and group chats using a modern interface.
